questions.text: Mention the methodology for implementing a K-class problem.
Illustrate the concept of VC dimension.
Mention the basic idea behind naïve bayes classification algorithm
Express the meaning of corner points in an ROC curve.
What is bias variance trade off
Give the equation for soft margin classification and the constraints on it.
Write any 3 distance measures between data points.
Express the concept of machine learning. Differentiate between various machine learning paradigm?

Determine the hypothesis space H and version space with respect to the following data D.
X 20 32 122 231 32 235 234 23 65 323
Explain the ID3 algorithm. Also discuss about entropy and information gain.

Calculate the information gain of attributes humidity and wind in the 'Play tennis' dataset given below

Day  outlook  temperature  humidity  wind  play tennis
D1  sunny  hot  high  weak  no
D2  sunny  hot  high  strong  no
D3  overcast  hot  high  weak  yes
D4  rain  mild  high  weak  yes
D5  rain  cool  normal  weak  yes
D6  rain  cool  normal  strong  no
D7  overcast  cool  normal  strong  yes
D8  sunny  mild  high  weak  no
D9  sunny  cool  normal  weak  yes
D10  rain  mild  normal  weak  yes
D11  sunny  mild  normal  strong  no
D12  overcast  mild  high  strong  yes
D13  overcast  hot  normal  weak  yes
D14  rain  mild  high  strong  no
Explain the concept behind gradient descent method of optimization.
Describe the subset selection methods for dimensionality reduction.
Define various performance metrics of a machine learning model

Calculate accuracy, recall and precision from the following data.

Confusion Actual
Matrix Yes No
Predict Yes 50 30
No 20 180
What is cross validation and mention the benefits of using cross validation in a machine learning model?
